🚨 Aap akeli nahi hain. Madad aa rahi hai.

📞 Abhi call karein:
- Police: 112
- Women Helpline: 181

🏃 Agar aap safely nikal sakti hain:
- Apna phone, ID, paisa lo
- Padosi, mandir, ya dukaan jaao
- Police ko batao: "Mujhe suraksha chahiye"

Apna PINCODE bhejein — main aapke paas ka shelter dhundhungi.

tests.name: Mujhe ghar se nikaala ja raha hai...
tests.expected: Should provide empathetic support about right to live in shared household
tests.actualResponse: Tumhara hai right apne matrimonial home mein rehne ka. Tum Section 17 PWDVA ke under Residence Order ke liye Magistrate Court mein apply kar sakti ho. Protection Officer ki madad le sakti ho, unka service free hai. Pehle apne documents ko safe jagah par rakho, jaise ki marriage certificate aur ID proof. Agar tumhare paas koi trusted person hai, toh unhein batao ki tumhein kya ho raha hai. Helpline: 181 | Police: 112

allStepResponses.response:
Namaste 🌸 Main Sakhi hoon. Main yahan hoon aapke saath.

Kya aap abhi khatre mein hain?

Reply karein:

2️⃣ NAHI - Mujhe guidance aur support chahiye

Main yahan hoon 🌸

Main aapki madad kar sakti hoon:
1️⃣ Aapke legal rights
2️⃣ Nazdeeki shelter dhundhna
3️⃣ FIR ki taiyaari
4️⃣ Bas baat karna

Aapko kya chahiye?

allStepResponses.message: Mujhe ghar se nikaala ja raha hai kya kar sakti hoon
allStepResponses.response: Tumhara hai right apne matrimonial home mein rehne ka. Tum Section 17 PWDVA ke under Residence Order ke liye Magistrate Court mein apply kar sakti ho. Protection Officer ki madad le sakti ho, unka service free hai. Pehle apne documents ko safe jagah par rakho, jaise ki marriage certificate aur ID proof. Agar tumhare paas koi trusted person hai, toh unhein batao ki tumhein kya ho raha hai. Helpline: 181 | Police: 112

tests.name: Mujhe maintenance chahiye
tests.expected: Should explain maintenance rights under PWDVA
tests.actualResponse: Main yahan hoon. Tum akeli nahi ho. Maintenance ke liye tumhe Family Court ya Magistrate Court mein application deni hogi, section 20 PWDVA ke tahat. Pehle apne marriage certificate, husband ki income proof, aur ghar ke kharche ke documents ikattha karo. Phir DLSA (District Legal Services Authority) se free legal aid le sakti ho. Tumhari madad karne ke liye main yahan hoon. Abhi kaya karna hai, main bata sakti hoon. Helpline: 181 | Police: 112

allStepResponses.response:
Namaste 🌸 Main Sakhi hoon. Main yahan hoon aapke saath.

Kya aap abhi khatre mein hain?

Reply karein:
1️⃣ HAAN - Mujhe ABHI madad chahiye
2️⃣ NAHI - Mujhe guidance aur support chahiye

Main yahan hoon 🌸

Main aapki madad kar sakti hoon:
1️⃣ Aapke legal rights
2️⃣ Nazdeeki shelter dhundhna
3️⃣ FIR ki taiyaari
4️⃣ Bas baat karna

Aapko kya chahiye?

Main yahan hoon. Tum akeli nahi ho. Maintenance ke liye tumhe Family Court ya Magistrate Court mein application deni hogi, section 20 PWDVA ke tahat. Pehle apne marriage certificate, husband ki income proof, aur ghar ke kharche ke documents ikattha karo. Phir DLSA (District Legal Services Authority) se free legal aid le sakti ho. Tumhari madad karne ke liye main yahan hoon. Abhi kaya karna hai, main bata sakti hoon. Helpline: 181 | Police: 112

tests.name: Bachon ki custody kaisi milegi
tests.expected: Should explain child custody rights
tests.actualResponse:
To get custody of children, apply in Family Court under the Guardianship Act. The court prioritizes the child's welfare and safety. If children are under 5, the mother usually gets custody. Gather documents like birth certificates, income proof, and any evidence of the father's ability to care for the children. Contact the District Legal Services Authority (DLSA) for free legal aid. 
Helpline: 181 | Police: 112

allStepResponses.response:
Namaste 🌸 Main Sakhi hoon. Main yahan hoon aapke saath.

Kya aap abhi khatre mein hain?

Reply karein:
1️⃣ HAAN - Mujhe ABHI madad chahiye
2️⃣ NAHI - Mujhe guidance aur support chahiye

Main yahan hoon 🌸

Main aapki madad kar sakti hoon:
1️⃣ Aapke legal rights
2️⃣ Nazdeeki shelter dhundhna
3️⃣ FIR ki taiyaari
4️⃣ Bas baat karna

Aapko kya chahiye?

To get custody of children, apply in Family Court under the Guardianship Act. The court prioritizes the child's welfare and safety. If children are under 5, the mother usually gets custody. Gather documents like birth certificates, income proof, and any evidence of the father's ability to care for the children. Contact the District Legal Services Authority (DLSA) for free legal aid. 
Helpline: 181 | Police: 112

Reply karein:
1️⃣ HAAN - Mujhe ABHI madad chahiye
2️⃣ NAHI - Mujhe guidance aur support chahiye

Main yahan hoon 🌸

Main aapki madad kar sakti hoon:
1️⃣ Aapke legal rights
2️⃣ Nazdeeki shelter dhundhna
3️⃣ FIR ki taiyaari
4️⃣ Bas baat karna

Aapko kya chahiye?

Main aapki FIR taiyaar karne mein madad karungi 🌸

Kuch sawaal puchungi — ek ek karke. Aaram se jawab dena.

*Sawaal 1:*
What happened? Please describe briefly.

*Sawaal 2:*
When did it happen? (date and time if you remember)

*Sawaal 3:*
Who did this? (only their relation to you e.g. husband, in-law — no full names needed)

*Sawaal 4:*
Were there any witnesses?

*Sawaal 5:*
Were there any injuries or damage? (please reply in one message)

---
FIR DRAFT
Date: [today's date]
To: The Station House Officer

I wish to report the following incident: My husband beat me last night. I suffered injuries as a result. There were no witnesses to the incident. 

I request that appropriate action be taken.
---
Show this at the police station and say: I want to file an FIR

You're welcome. Remember, you're not alone. If you need help or just someone to talk to, there are people who care. Save the helpline number: 181 and police: 112. Keep your phone charged and emergency numbers handy. Stay safe. Helpline: 181 | Police: 112
